title: The MACU Report — Episode 13 — The Combine
notes: WEEK 2 (Wed) — Road to the Crater Bowl, Day 3. Fresh reset: NO Unit 7/moon/Signal. CONTINUITY: moon returned end of ep10, normal, unmentioned. Roster is ZERO (ep12 the last Slag walked home) → Ron holds live tryouts ('The Combine'); Coach Bodhi=Snoop judges 'energy', prefers the least-alive; nobody viable, so Ron drafts BRENDA (Walter's car, where Gary=Newman lives) onto the Slags. Wider-MACU bit: SURVIVAL STRENGTH SANCTUM (SARGE=Announcer, VO over gym b-roll). ONE ignored AI beat (Glowboys' 0.4s 40-yd = machine/reactor/war-bot tech) — long fuse to ~ep15. Recurring kill-line: '____ during the weather' (ep13: the barrel rolls into the crater). NO new clones — all profiles exist. NO hold cues. v2 script (writers'-room punch-up). NEW GRAPHIC: open_tryouts card. REUSE: the_crater_bowl; scoreboard comp new state 'scoreboard_noline' (CRATER BOWL / NO LINE / UNPRICEABLE); macu_weather. OmniVoice /generate = multipart -F.

comfyui.note: zeroscope_v2_576w (watermark-free). 384x384x24f locked - do not bump resolution.

style.suffix: , black and white, grainy vintage analog television footage, 1970s broadcast, retro futurism, low resolution, washed out, soft focus
style.negative: shutterstock, watermark, text, caption, logo, color, colour, modern, smartphone, digital screen, hd, 4k, sharp, blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, extra fingers

render_rule: For each shot: full_prompt = prompt_core + style.suffix; negative = style.negative; seed = shot.seed. Cold-start fire-and-poll. For each cue with non-empty vo: POST the line (multipart form-data -F, NOT JSON) to the speaker_map voice -> vo/<cue_id>.wav. No hold cues this episode. Per-shot screen time = cue duration / number of shots. Apply jank filtergraph, RIFE 3x, concat, mux VO, mix music beds, mix sfx one-shots, burn subs -> final/ep13.mp4.

title_assets.open_tryouts: episodes/ep13/titles/open_tryouts.mp4 (NEW — Hyperframes 'macu-open-tryouts-card'; reads 'SLAGS OPEN TRYOUTS'. Max: render + copy here)
title_assets.scoreboard_noline: episodes/ep13/titles/scoreboard_noline.mp4 (NEW STATE of ep11 'crater-bowl-scoreboard-card': CRATER BOWL / NO LINE / UNPRICEABLE)
title_assets.macu_weather: REUSE — copy ep11/ep7 weather card here, or auto-resolves from shared assets/titles

beds.name: combine
beds.note: Big-band bed under the tryout combine segment. Loop to cover.

music.note: Intro + a bed under the combine + outro. Rest plays dry.

sfx.note: One-shots mixed at each cue's start (VO stays full). SYNTH (Max, ffmpeg into assets/sfx/, reuse from ep11/ep12): intercom_crackle.wav (Gary's intercom signature), reactor_hum.wav (low ominous hum under the Glowboys/reactor beat). Missing file -> skip gracefully.

subtitles.note: Do NOT put FontName=/Fontsize= in force_style; stage 8 prepends its own from font/fontsize.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Good evening, MACU. It's Wednesday. The Sector Nine Slags' current roster stands at — and I want to be transparent — zero. Which is why tonight, we make history.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: The Slags have no players, no coach who blinks, and one athlete who walked into the wasteland during last night's weather.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Which is why tonight: the first-ever live Crater Bowl tryout. The Slags are open for applications.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: Mornin', fellas. Brenda made coffee. Well — I made it. In Brenda. We're settlin' in real nice out here. Thinkin' about little curtains. She likes the light.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Please get out of my car, Gary. To the field.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: We go live to the Big Hole, where Crater Carl is running the Slags' open combine.

cues.speaker: CRATER CARL
cues.vo: Thanks, Walter! Tremendous turnout — we got nine, maybe ten warm bodies, and I'm being generous on both numbers! The book opened the Slags at a hundred-to-one, and I'm told the linemaker is now on the phone with a priest! First up — a real specimen!

cues.speaker: CHET
cues.vo: Hi, yeah, Chet. I've never played, I bruise looking at things, and I have a note from my physician that just says no. But I've got a great attitude and I own my own helmet.

cues.speaker: COACH BODHI
cues.vo: I'm not feeling it, Chet. Too much pulse. A roster of the living is a roster of the afraid. Now — that barrel. That barrel has presence. The barrel stays.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Bodhi, the barrel is a barrel. Does anyone out there have a pulse? It's optional! Pulse is now officially optional! ...I hear how that sounds. The requirement has been lowered.

cues.speaker: SARGE
cues.vo: In the aftermath of the AI Wars, where strength is not a virtue but a lifeline — one fortress stands. Survival Strength Sanctum. We do not make survivors. We make warriors. Our clients have survived three of the four major collapses.

cues.speaker: SARGE
cues.vo: Confront the challenge. Five five five, two three six eight. One call is all it takes to forge the warrior within. That's the Sanctum guarantee.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Sanctum. Be honest. Can you build me eleven warriors by Friday? ...Can you build me one? ...Can you build me most of one?

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Back at the combine, Coach Bodhi has finalized his evaluations.

cues.speaker: COACH BODHI
cues.vo: I've made my cuts. I'm releasing the men and keeping the barrel, the strong silent fella in the trench coat, and the good empty space by the third cone. The space tested well. Real stillness in it.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: That's not a roster, Bodhi, that's a yard sale! ...No. No. I know what we do. We need a frame. We need heart. We need something that shows up every single night and never leaves.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Effective immediately, the Sector Nine Slags sign — Brenda. She starts at left tackle. Look at that frame. Look at that wheelbase. That is a competitor.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Ron. That is my car.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: We're IN, Brenda! Baby, we made the TEAM! I told you — I told you we'd find our people!

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: With Sector Nine fielding one car and a quantity of strong empty space, the book has taken the Crater Bowl off the board entirely. There is no line. They could not price it.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Then put my house on the Slags. And Walter's house. And the car — wait, the car's playing. Just the houses.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Ron, it is Wednesday.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: And I'll do it again Thursday. We're building something.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: She'll need a number. And a little jersey. Does Brenda get a jersey? She's asking.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: We'll see, Gary.

cues.speaker: CRATER CARL
cues.vo: And across town, the Glowboys posted their combine numbers — the forty-yard dash in zero-point-four seconds. Folks, that's a new record, and also possibly a sin!

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Zero-point-four — no man runs that, Walter. That's not a time, that's a machine time. That's the reactor. Those aren't players, those are the same thing they put in the war—

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Marvelous athletes. Weather.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Friday's forecast for the Big Hole: ashfall, a chance of structural collapse, a light metallic drizzle, and a fifty percent chance of glow — up ten. Conditions: mild. Perfect Crater Bowl weather.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: That's our broadcast, MACU. We have a roster again — a car, a barrel, and the quiet space by the third cone. It's a young team. It's a brave team. It has heart. More heart than forty glowing—

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: The barrel rolled into the crater during the weather, Ron.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: ...Then it's down there waiting for them. That's strategy. Goodnight, MACU.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: Night, fellas. Night, Brenda. Big day tomorrow. First practice. We're gonna stretch.
